policy.edit_rule: Selected scripts must not be edited, replaced, or removed without explicit maintainer confirmation for that release.
policy.failure_rule: If a selected script fails because the recommended usage shape changed, stop and ask whether the release should accept that usage update.
policy.release_test_permissions: Release example checks run with explicit all-allowed test capability policy when Skills, Actions, Workspace, network, Python, shell, HTTP, browse, search, or MCP capability loading may be exercised.
policy.release_notes: Record commands, environment, stable key output, and any skipped or failed checks in release review notes.

selected_scripts.release_gate_reason: 4.1.4.1 restores AgentExecution result readers and one-run lifecycle behavior.
